_lock_notes: v2.0.1 patch over v2.0. operational_policies block added (scheduled_operational_work + urgent_after_hours). All other fields unchanged from v2.0.
_change_log_from_v2_0: operational_policies.scheduled_operational_work added: before-5pm only, no override path, reason captured (no on-ground staff after 5pm)
operational_policies.urgent_after_hours added: case-by-case structure, 24/7 line for guests, AI commits to nothing specific about dispatch

company.registered_address: Octopus Building, Pointe aux Canonniers, Grand Baie, Mauritius

whatsapp_messaging.session_window_rules: After a guest replies to a WhatsApp message, a 24-hour session window opens during which Friday can send free-form messages. After 24 hours of guest silence, only WhatsApp-approved template messages may be sent until the guest replies again.

accounts.label: MCB_EUR_OPERATING
accounts.purpose: EUR operating account, primary direct-booking receipts (international guests)

accounts.label: MCB_USD_OPERATING
accounts.purpose: USD operating account, alternative direct-booking receipts

accounts.label: MCB_MUR_SYNDIC
accounts.purpose: Syndic operations. Mandate currently informal as of 2026-05-13; formal management contract + live fee flows pending post-Sprint 8.

direct_booking_payment_communication.current_practice: Direct-booking inquiries from the current website trigger an automated message containing EUR, USD, and MUR account details. Guest chooses currency.
direct_booking_payment_communication.ai_drafting_guidance: Do not inline bank account details in any guest-facing draft. If a direct-booking guest asks where or how to pay, defer to the automated payment-details message already sent at inquiry time, or defer to the team.

tourist_tax.guest_facing_communication: If a guest asks about tourist tax: respond that it is already included in the price and cannot be removed. Do not proactively raise tourist tax in messages.

cleaning_fee.treatment: Net pass-through (VAT optimization). Disclosed to owner; not marked up.
cleaning_fee.guest_facing_communication: Cleaning fee is disclosed at booking. Do not propose to waive.

linen_fee.transition_status: Notice already sent to owners. Public T&C remains at EUR 2.50 until July 1, 2026.
linen_fee.owner_facing_communication: Until July 1, 2026, linen fee is EUR 2.50 per guest per night. From July 1, 2026 onwards, linen fee is EUR 1.25 per guest per night.

minimum_stay.exception_policy: Exceptions for 1-2 night stays are case-by-case. Exception-handling logic lives in operational-rules.json (Phase 6).

direct_booking.current_policy: 30 days before check-in date: full refund. Inside 30 days: no refund. Mirrors Airbnb strict tier.
direct_booking.proposed_change_status: Two-tier structure (installments at base price vs. paid-in-full upfront at non-refundable discount) is under consideration as a Sprint 9 commercial decision. NOT current policy. Do not reference in messages.

airbnb.policy_source: Airbnb platform strict cancellation policy applies.

booking_com.policy_source: Booking.com platform cancellation policy applies. Defer to platform terms.

scheduled_operational_work.reason: No on-ground staff available for interventions after 5 PM.
scheduled_operational_work.ai_drafting_guidance: Propose only before-5-PM times for scheduled operational requests (check-in flexes, maintenance windows, in-property coordination). Do not imply flexibility on this. The team handles after-hours urgent matters case-by-case, not as a structured override.

urgent_after_hours.structure: No formal on-call rotation. Handled case-by-case by whoever takes the call.
urgent_after_hours.ai_drafting_guidance: For urgent matters after hours, the AI directs the guest to the 24/7 line and commits to nothing specific about response time or dispatch. The AI never says 'we'll send someone' for after-hours urgent, that's a human decision at call time. The AI may offer grounded temporary mitigation per BV-10 when canonical property data supports it (framed as 'in the meantime, until our team can reach you').
